zh-CN.name: 茼蒿
zh-CN.intro: 茼蒿是一种绿色的蔬菜，叶子像羽毛一样软软的，闻起来有特别的清香，吃起来有一点点苦，但是很爽口。它常常长在菜地里，可以炒着吃，也可以煮汤。

story.title: 🥬第一次吃茼蒿
story.body: 小羊咩咩跟着妈妈来到菜园，看见一片绿油油的叶子，像一朵朵绿色的小花。妈妈轻轻摘下一把，说：这是茼蒿，可好吃啦！小羊咩咩皱起眉头：可是它闻起来味道怪怪的。妈妈笑了笑，把茼蒿洗干净，放进锅里炒了炒。一股清香飘出来，小羊咩咩忍不住尝了一口，虽然有一点点苦，但是嘴巴里凉凉的、香香的。小羊咩咩高兴地又吃了一大口：妈妈，茼蒿真特别，我明天还想吃！从此，小羊咩咩爱上了这种香香的绿叶菜。

knowledge.title: 吃茼蒿有什么好处？
knowledge.body: 茼蒿含有丰富的维生素和纤维，吃茼蒿可以帮助消化，让肚子舒服。它还有独特的香味，能让人胃口大开，是春天里很棒的蔬菜哦！

en.name: Crown Daisy
en.intro: Crown daisy is a green vegetable with soft, feathery leaves. It has a special fragrance and tastes a little bitter but refreshing. It grows in fields and can be stir-fried or used in soups.

story.title: 🥬First Time Eating Crown Daisy
story.body: Little Lamb followed her mother to the vegetable garden and saw a patch of green leaves that looked like tiny green flowers. Her mother gently picked a bunch and said, 'This is crown daisy, it’s delicious!' Little Lamb wrinkled her nose, 'But it smells funny.' Mother smiled, washed the leaves, and stir-fried them. A lovely fragrance filled the air. Little Lamb couldn’t resist tasting a bite. It was a bit bitter, but it felt cool and aromatic in her mouth. Little Lamb happily took another big bite and said, 'Mom, crown daisy is so special! I want to eat it again tomorrow.' From then on, Little Lamb fell in love with this fragrant leafy green.

knowledge.title: Why are crown daisies good for you?
knowledge.body: Crown daisies are full of vitamins and fiber. Eating them helps digestion and keeps your tummy happy. Their unique fragrance can also whet your appetite. They are a wonderful spring vegetable!
